affected_files.change: new file — ContentStore: content/<fileID>.v1.md create/write path, WAL-before-apply via engine/wal.AppendAndApply
new file — TestContentCreate and ordering/verification tests

dependencies.reason: read-only dependency on already-verified public API (task-1.3, merged)
content.go is additive; no existing catalog.go/record.go behavior is modified

dependents.impact: will build read/version/delete paths on top of ContentStore introduced here

risk_notes: Additive-only change: new files, no modification to engine/wal or existing engine/catalog files.

Single-threaded Phase 1 assumption preserved: no new cross-cutting locking introduced; content-write+catalog-Put is not made atomic as a unit beyond WAL-before-apply ordering (concurrency hardening deferred to Epic 2A per repo convention).

Content path uses a hardcoded 'v1' version segment (pre-MVCC, single-version scope per issue title) rather than CatalogRecord.CurrentVersion, to avoid scope creep into MVCC versioning (a separate, later epic).
